reasoning: The 2025 Atlanta mayoral election will take place on November 4, 2025. Walter Reeves, a former 2021 mayoral candidate (who lost), filed initial paperwork to begin fundraising for the 2025 election earlier this year. However, the official qualifying period for candidates occurred in August 2025. Following the close of the period, the official list of candidates for the 2025 mayoral ballot does not include Walter Reeves. The only challengers to the current incumbent, Mayor Andre Dickens, are Helmut Domagalski, Kalema Jackson, and Eddie Andrew Meredith. Because Reeves is not officially on the ballot, his chances of winning the mayoral election are virtually 0. However, adhering to the probability limits, I am setting the probability at the minimum allowable boundary of 0.02.
